title: Stable Release User
objective: A disposable OpenClaw env that has been started on the stable release track before testing beta or local-build upgrade behavior.

setup.title: Write Stable Release Marker
setup.intent: Persist stable release metadata after the env is first started so reports can prove the upgrade source shape.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node -e 'const fs=require("fs"), path=require("path"); const home=process.env.OPENCLAW_HOME; fs.mkdirSync(path.join(home,"config"),{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(home,"config","channel.json"),JSON.stringify({schemaVersion:"kova.fixture.channel.v1",channel:"stable"},null,2)); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(home,".openclaw-channel"),"stable\n");'

cleanupGuarantees: disposable env cleanup removes stable release fixture files

source.note: The scenario starts the env through the real stable release track before upgrading it.
